parameters.name: Horizontal
parameters.description: Set the horizontal rotation of the Solar Panel (clockwise, 0-360°, data port is at 270°)

parameters.name: Vertical
parameters.description: Sets the vertical angle of the Solar Panel (As of at least version 0.2.3263.16264, solar panels accept input in degrees above the horizon instead of in percent, so the solar panels travel between inputs of 15 and 165, with 90 being straight up. Previously, this was supposedly a Percentage "accepting 0-100% which translates to 15°-165°, 50%=90° =zenith")

parameters.name: On
parameters.description: Turns the solar panel on or off

outputs.name: Charge
outputs.description: Returns the power generated in Watts

outputs.name: Horizontal
outputs.description: Returns the horizontal rotation of the Solar Panel

outputs.name: Vertical
outputs.description: Returns the vertical angle of the Solar Panel

outputs.name: Maximum
outputs.description: Maximum possible power for this planet

outputs.name: Ratio
outputs.description: How close to maximum current performance is, 1.0 means panel is perfectly directed and unobstructed

outputs.name: On
outputs.description: Returns the on/off state of the solar panel
